discrepancies_new.description: explicit (a_0, a_1, a_2) -> (alpha_inf, alpha_0, beta_inf, beta_0) chart-map ABSENT from 058R + 069 + spec body + slot 07 PDF + slot 08 BLMP carry-forward; 058R Phase B canonical_map.md L136-140 verbatim quote 'this is residual R1 partially closed' indicates the chart-map IS the open R1 itself; substrate gap IS the residual-R1 description
discrepancies_new.severity: BLOCKING (routes to A.1.5.F1 substrate gap; STEP A.2 / A.3 NOT REACHED; verdict cascades to NO_GO_SUBSTRATE_INSUFFICIENT)
discrepancies_new.downstream_effect: 069r2 R1-CLOSURE FIRE drafting BLOCKED until W21 LANE-1 T1-Synth analytic-guidance request OR alternative literature acquisition supplies the chart-map

discrepancies_new.description: 058R phase_b5_affine_weyl_crosswalk.md L88-89 lists alpha = 4(1 + 2*a_0 - 2*a_1) etc. as P_III equation coefficients (the (alpha, beta, gamma, delta) of the standard P_III ODE w'' = w'^2/w - w'/t + (alpha*w^2 + beta)/t + gamma*w^3 + delta/w); these are NOT the Okamoto four-tuple (alpha_inf, alpha_0, beta_inf, beta_0); discovered by reading the 058R substrate during 071 STEP A.1.5; documented to prevent future false-positive substrate-search matches
discrepancies_new.severity: DOCUMENTATION (does not block 071 verdict; clarifies notation discipline for 069r2 / W21 LANE-1)
discrepancies_new.scope: 071 NEW (notation collision discovered during 071 substrate search)
discrepancies_new.downstream_effect: future drafting prompts citing 'alpha, beta, gamma, delta' should disambiguate (P_III ODE coefficients vs Okamoto four-tuple) explicitly

discrepancies_carryforward.description: 069 Phase D numerical residual at 50 dps reaches single-bottleneck floor; 069 handoff L51-60 + L78-83 verbatim
discrepancies_carryforward.downstream_effect: Phase D numerical extraction ladder gated below 50 dps until R1 chart-map closes

discrepancies_carryforward.description: 069 anomaly D2 (Wasow 1965 vs Birkhoff-Trjitzinsky 1933 normalization convention drift) carried forward
discrepancies_carryforward.downstream_effect: documentation only; does not affect R1 chart-map gap

discrepancies_carryforward.description: CT v1.3 §3.5 four-tuple (1/6, 0, 0, -1/2) Okamoto null-sum = -1/3 != 0; this IS the residual R1 itself (carried forward from 058R Phase D verdict)
discrepancies_carryforward.severity: BLOCKING (root cause of R1; supersedes a 'partial closure' phrase from 058R Phase B)
discrepancies_carryforward.downstream_effect: 071 verdict NO_GO_SUBSTRATE_INSUFFICIENT cascades from this open residual
